candidate.objective: A skilled Poly Welder and Pipe Fitter with specialist experience in HDPE pipeline systems across a range of pipe sizes from DN63 to DN900. Liam is currently placed with ACM Resources and brings hands-on proficiency with Dixon, McElroy, and World fusion machines, along with spool fabrication and installation across civil and industrial projects.

duties: Performing butt fusion and electrofusion welding on HDPE pipelines ranging from DN63 to DN900 diameter.
Operating Dixon, McElroy, and World fusion machines to applicable welding parameters and quality standards.
Fabricating and installing HDPE spool assemblies for civil and resource industry clients.
Reading and interpreting isometric drawings and pipeline specifications to ensure correct installation.
Adhering to site-specific HSEC requirements and ACM Resources quality management standards.
Assisted formwork carpenters with stripping, cleaning, and repositioning formwork systems.
Performed concreting operations including placement, vibration, and finishing.
Carried out steel fixings including bar tying and mesh placement to engineer specifications.
Maintained a safe and organised worksite in compliance with WHS requirements.

skills.detail: Proficient in butt fusion and electrofusion welding techniques for HDPE pipelines DN63–DN900. Experienced with Dixon, McElroy, and World fusion machines.
Competent in HDPE pipe fitting, spool fabrication, and pressure pipeline installation across civil and resource sector projects.
Practical experience in commercial formwork stripping, concreting, and steel fixing gained through trade assistant role.

certifications.details: General Construction Induction — Construction Safety card.
Nationally recognised competency for butt fusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Nationally recognised competency for electrofusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
High Risk Work Licence for forklift operation.
Current Western Australian Class C motor vehicle driver licence.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
